title: Safety To Look To Oneself.
content:
For my neighbour I'll not know,
    Whether high he builds or no:
    Only this I'll look upon,
    Firm be my foundation.
    Sound or unsound, let it be!
    'Tis the lot ordain'd for me.
    He who to the ground does fall
    Has not whence to sink at all.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Safety To Look To Oneself."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
